files.description: Project-wide conventions: GitHub Flow, Conventional Commits, SemVer, hard rules (TDD mandatory, security scrutiny, no merge without human approval).
Backend Rust conventions: error handling with thiserror, sqlx for queries, time crate (not chrono), explicit module boundaries, RLS-aware DB access.

Frontend React + TS conventions: functional components, ReactElement return type, no any/!/as-against-object-literals, AbortController in useEffect, Tailwind tokens (no raw hex, no inline JSX style), Zod at boundaries, shadcn via CLI only.

Strict lint policy ratified for both stacks. Backend: clippy::pedantic + nursery + cargo-deny. Frontend: tseslint strictTypeChecked + eslint-plugin-react. Style nits should already be machine-caught — flag what slipped past.
Authorization and access control security checklist.
Input validation and injection prevention security checklist.
XML and serialization (XXE, deserialization) security checklist.
File handling and upload security checklist.
Logging policy: never log secrets or PII.

rules.rule: Never surface decrypted secret values. When discussing secrets (env vars, API keys, session cookies, DB passwords, OIDC client secrets), describe presence and shape only (source, length, format) — never the value itself.

Reverie is open-source and self-hosted. Threat model is a multi-user exposed instance, not a private homelab. Treat security findings on user input, auth, sessions, secrets, file I/O, XML parsing, outbound HTTP, and response headers as load-bearing — not nice-to-have.
Backend uses the `time` crate, not `chrono`. Flag any new `chrono` import.
TDD is mandatory. A code change without a corresponding test (happy path, negative, edge case where non-obvious) should be flagged as incomplete.
No raw hex colour literals in .ts/.tsx. Every brand colour comes from the canonical token system (--color-canvas, --color-fg, --color-accent, etc.). Lockup.tsx is the documented exemption.
No TypeScript `enum`. Use `as const` objects + union types instead.
No inline JSX `style={{...}}` object literals. Use Tailwind classes or design tokens. Lockup.tsx and src/components/ui/** (shadcn-generated) are the documented exemptions.
shadcn/ui primitives in src/components/ui/** are CLI-generated (`npx shadcn@latest add`). Do not flag style or convention divergences in this directory unless they affect runtime correctness.
Conventional Commits are mandatory. Branch names follow GitHub Flow with prefixes feat/, fix/, refactor/, docs/, chore/, test/.
